owner_local.label: Owner Local
owner_local.description: Owner-operated local posture that may allow danger-full-access, approval never, and local auto commit/push.

portable_local.label: Portable Local
portable_local.description: Portable reference posture for local-first development without owner-only defaults.

reviewed_team.label: Reviewed Team
reviewed_team.description: Team posture with reviewed release flow and stricter human change control.
